analysis.confidenceStatement: We are 95% confident that the true mean productivity speedup is between 9.57x and 9.83x. There is insufficient evidence (p ≥ 0.05) that the speedup exceeds 10x.
recommendations: ⚠ Evidence suggests 8-10x speedup; 10x claim not validated at 95% confidence
⚠ Statistical power is 0.0%; recommend 550 samples for 80% power
